privileged_info_summary: The expected output path for the exported DICOM file is exactly '/home/ga/DICOM/exports/finding_sc.dcm', as hardcoded in the task setup and result export scripts. The required SOP Class UID prefix '1.2.840.10008.5.1.4.1.1.7' corresponds exactly to the 'Secondary Capture Image Storage' class, which was confirmed using the pydicom library.
